intro: Can You Identify the World by Its Shape?
description:
Look at the silhouette and guess the country or region!
World Map Silhouette Quiz is a quiz game that lets you enjoy learning world geography in a fun and accessible way.

Use the shapes on screen as clues and discover the fun of recognizing countries from their outlines. As you play, you will naturally become more familiar with the world map, making it a great choice for learning, casual solo play, or quiz time with family and friends.

Perfect for players who enjoy geography, quiz games, and educational challenges.
Test your knowledge and see how many places around the world you can identify!

Some map and silhouette representations in this game may be simplified for gameplay purposes.
